# JLS Reglazing - JL Bathtub Renovation Services
> Professional bathtub and kitchen reglazing in Southern California since 2004.

## Company Overview
JLS Reglazing (legal name: JL Bathtub Renovation Services) is a Hispanic-owned reglazing company based in Southern California. Founded by Jorge Saldana, JLS Reglazing has over 20 years of hands-on experience and has refinished more than 4,000 bathtubs, sinks, countertops, and tile surfaces. The company is licensed, insured, and provides a 2-year warranty on all refinishing work.

## Services Offered
- **Bathtub Refinishing & Reglazing**: Restores fiberglass, porcelain, cast iron, acrylic, and ceramic tile tubs to like-new condition. Cost: $300–$450 per tub.
- **Kitchen Countertop Refinishing**: Restores tile and laminate countertops with durable, heat-resistant finishes. Cost: $350–$550.
- **Sink Refinishing**: Kitchen and bathroom sink reglazing for porcelain and stainless steel. Cost: $250–$400.
- **Bath Vanity Refinishing**: Cultured marble, laminate, and wood vanity restoration. Cost: $300–$500.
- **Crack & Chip Repair**: Structural crack repair and surface damage restoration before refinishing. Cost: $150–$350.
- **Bathtub Enclosure Refinishing**: Complete tile wall and tub surround reglazing with mold-resistant finishes. Cost: $450–$600.
- **Tub Cut-Out & Foundation Repairs**: Accessibility conversions and structural reinforcement for damaged bathtub foundations. Cost: $400–$600.

## Service Areas
- **San Bernardino County**: San Bernardino, Fontana, Rancho Cucamonga, Ontario, Upland, Redlands, Rialto, Colton, Highland, Yucaipa, Loma Linda, Chino, Chino Hills, Montclair
- **Riverside County**: Riverside, Corona, Moreno Valley, Temecula, Murrieta, Perris, Lake Elsinore, Menifee, Beaumont, Banning, San Jacinto, Norco, Eastvale
- **Los Angeles County**: Los Angeles, Pasadena, Long Beach, Glendale, Burbank, West Covina, Pomona, Covina, Azusa, Monrovia, Arcadia, Alhambra, El Monte, Diamond Bar
- **Hemet Area**: Hemet, San Jacinto, Idyllwild, Valle Vista, East Hemet
- **High Desert**: Victorville, Hesperia, Apple Valley, Barstow, Adelanto, Phelan

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does bathtub reglazing cost?
Bathtub reglazing costs between $300 and $600 for most residential projects. This is up to 90% less than full bathtub replacement ($1,500–$5,000+). The exact price depends on tub condition, surface type, and repairs needed. Multi-unit properties with 5+ units receive volume discounts.

### What is the difference between bathtub reglazing and refinishing?
Bathtub reglazing and refinishing are the same process. Both terms describe professional restoration: surface prep, crack/chip repair, acid etching, and applying a durable factory-quality finish. The industry uses both terms interchangeably.

### How long does bathtub reglazing last?
Professional reglazing lasts 10 to 15 years with proper care. Avoid abrasive cleaners, use non-slip mats instead of adhesive strips, and clean with mild soap. JLS Reglazing includes a 2-year warranty on all work.

### How long does the reglazing process take?
On-site work takes 3 to 5 hours. The surface needs 48 to 72 hours to cure before use. This is significantly faster than full replacement, which takes 3 to 5 days plus plumbing work.

### Can you reglaze a fiberglass bathtub?
Yes. Reglazing works on all tub materials: fiberglass, acrylic, porcelain, cast iron, ceramic tile, and cultured marble. The preparation process is adjusted for each material type.

### Is bathtub reglazing worth it?
Yes. Reglazing is the most cost-effective option when a tub is structurally sound but cosmetically worn. It saves 80–90% vs. replacement, takes one day instead of 3–5 days, and requires no plumbing or demolition.

### What areas does JLS Reglazing serve?
JLS Reglazing serves San Bernardino County, Riverside County, Los Angeles County, Hemet/San Jacinto, and the High Desert (Victorville, Hesperia, Apple Valley). Free on-site quotes throughout the service area.

### Does JLS Reglazing work with property managers and multi-unit complexes?
Yes. JLS Reglazing regularly works with property management companies, apartment complexes, and multi-unit residential buildings. Volume pricing is available for 5+ units. Our 24-hour turnaround per unit minimizes vacancy time.

## Key Differentiators
- 20+ years hands-on experience (founded 2004)
- 4,000+ units refinished across Southern California
- 2-year warranty on all refinishing work
- Licensed and insured
- Hispanic-owned & operated family business
- Free on-site quotes
- Same-day scheduling available
- Bilingual service (English and Spanish)
- 24-hour turnaround for most projects
